free_text: Properties of compound nucleus from experimental
Van de Graaff used to produce 2.2 MeV
Silicon semiconductor of resistivity greater than
6000 ohm-cm with area 25 mm2 and resolution 1%.
Experimental values were compared with the
results of the formalism of T.Ericson, Advances in
.No correction was made for edge effects as the
angular distribution of the emitted alphas was

The absolute values are affected by an
error of about 30%. They are in reasonable agreement
